name: eval_r128_candidates
description: Top candidates from r128_sweet_spot. Comparing the two lowest-loss runs, the stable lr=3e-4, and the curriculum run that hit 0.161 before regressing. Baseline included as perceptual reference.

adapters.description: No LoRA — base model output for perceptual reference
Best loss overall (0.137), still descending at step 10k
Tied with lr_5e4 at 0.139, higher rank — does extra capacity help perceptually?
Stable plateau from step 4k to 10k (0.221) — visually confirmed clean spectrograms
Best min loss of all (0.161 at step 6k), regressed to 0.193 after curriculum switch — curious if the early checkpoint sounds better
Same run at its actual best step (before regression) — compare against adapter_final to hear the regression
